title: KKTN-019 Business trip! Acme exercise bike is good (at home)! Tsugumi, 22 years old, Tsugumi Mizusawa
description: In order to solve the lack of exercise of the AV actress, SOD will deliver a special exercise bike with an electric massager attached to the saddle to the actress's house! The girl this time is Tsugumi-chan, who is still innocent in her cute plain clothes. Contrary to what it looks like, there are lots of naughty things in the house, naughty underwear when you take off your clothes, and sexual desire is fully open from the morning! When I straddled the acme exercise bike, I said "I have to row" at first, but from the middle I only said "it feels good". Even so, it's a crazy metamorphosis girl who makes the vibration of the electric machine stronger! If you sweat that much, you're exercising enough, so there's no problem in terms of SOD!
